o 2'o 2'

[...] born by Nintur (Akk. [whom] Belet-ili gave birth to),

[... ša₂] ⸢be⸣-let—DINGIR-MEŠ ul-⸢du⸣-[šu]
o 3'o 3'

[... ḫur]-saŋ-ŋa₂ ⸢e₃⸣-[a]

[...] who came forth from the mountain (Akk. [who] grew up in the mountains),

[... ša₂] ⸢ina⸣ KURi ir-bu-⸢u₂⸣
o 4'o 4'

[...] ⸢usu?⸣-a-ni-ta nir-⸢ŋal₂⸣

[...] son of Enlil, confident in his strength,

[...] ⸢mar⸣ dEN.LIL₂ ša₂ ana e-mu-qi₂-šu₂ ⸢tak?⸣-[lu?]
o 5'o 5'

[...] ⸢me⸣-teš₂ ga-⸢i⸣-[i]

[...] let me praise [...],

[...] lu-⸢na⸣-ʾi-⸢id⸣
o 6'o 6'

[...] me-teš₂ ga-⸢i⸣-[i]

[...] let me praise [...].

[...] lu-na-ʾi-⸢id⸣
o 7'o 7'

[... gur₄-ra]-zu-⸢še₃⸣

[...] in your very strong [...],

[...] pu-ug-gu-la-⸢ti?⸣
o 8'o 8'

[... kalag-ga]-⸢zu⸣-[še₃]

[... in] your [strength],

[... dan-nu]-ti-⸢ka⸣
